name: 1F Cash Advance
description_short: 1F Cash Advance Woodinville, Washington — 1F Cash Advance offers online payday and installment loans from $100–$5,000 with no hard credit check and same...
description_long:
1F Cash Advance is a direct lender founded approximately six years ago, operating more than 80 physical locations across 37 states while also offering a fully online application process. The company has issued over 3 million loans and markets itself as a licensed loan provider focused on serving borrowers with any credit background, including those with poor or limited credit histories. Its dual online-and-store model is relatively uncommon among payday lenders, giving borrowers the option of in-person service or the convenience of applying from home.

The company offers three core products. Cash advances (payday loans) range from $100 to $1,000 and are designed to be repaid by the borrower's next paycheck, typically within two to four weeks. Installment loans extend up to $5,000 and allow repayment in fixed monthly payments over up to 24 months, targeting larger one-time expenses such as medical bills or home repairs. Same-day loans are available when applications are submitted and approved before 10:30 AM on weekdays; applications approved after that cutoff or on weekends are funded the next business day.

What distinguishes 1F Cash Advance from many online-only lenders is its brick-and-mortar presence in 37 states, which enables in-store applicants to receive instant cash via post-dated check rather than waiting for an ACH transfer. The lender does not charge application fees and states there are no hidden fees, with all costs disclosed upfront in the loan agreement. The application requires no hard credit inquiry, meaning it does not affect the applicant's FICO score during the initial review process.

Borrowers should weigh these conveniences against the cost. Payday loans carry a maximum APR of 600% and installment loans up to 490%—rates that are extremely high relative to mainstream credit. These products are appropriate only for genuine short-term emergencies when no lower-cost alternative is available. Borrowers who cannot repay by the due date risk a debt cycle. 1F Cash Advance is not available in all states, and actual rates and terms vary by state law and individual credit profile.
pros: No hard credit check — application does not impact FICO score
Same-day funding available for loans approved before 10:30 AM on weekdays
Physical store locations in 37 states for in-person cash pickup
No application fees on payday or installment loans
Installment loans up to $5,000 with repayment terms up to 24 months
Transparent fee disclosure — all costs outlined in the loan agreement upfront
Over 3 million loans issued across 6 years of operation
cons: Payday loan APR reaches up to 600% — among the highest legal rates available
Installment loan APR reaches up to 490% — far above mainstream lenders
Short repayment window on cash advances (next paycheck) increases rollover risk
Only available in 37 states — not a nationwide option
Loan ceiling of $1,000 for payday products limits usefulness for larger emergencies
best_for: Borrowers with poor or no credit who cannot qualify for a bank loan or credit card
People facing a small emergency expense under $1,000 who need cash within 24 hours
Consumers who prefer in-person service and can visit a physical branch location
Borrowers who need a slightly larger amount ($1,000–$5,000) and can manage installment repayments
diagnosis: 1F Cash Advance is best suited for consumers with bad or no credit who need $100–$1,000 quickly and have no access to lower-cost credit. The main caveat is cost: APRs up to 600% on payday loans make these products viable only as a last resort for genuine short-term emergencies, not recurring cash flow gaps.
services: In-store cash advance loans at 80+ branch locations
Unsecured installment loans (up to $5,000, up to 24 months)
Same-day funding for weekday approvals before 10:30 AM local time
Direct bank deposit for approved funds
Instant cash via post-dated check (in-store applicants only)
Loan application by ZIP code and state eligibility check
